code:
import io
import string

mut found = false
mut answer = ""
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let t = string.trim(line)
    if not found and not string.is_empty(t)
      answer = t
      found = true
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end

if found
  println(answer)
else
  println("(none)")
end
